title: Timeout error during Google OAuth with ngrok
symptom: When attempting to authorize Google Drive credentials, the browser times out with 'The connection has timed out'. This occurs during the redirect step of the OAuth process.
root_cause: The timeout occurs because the `WEBHOOK_TUNNEL_URL` configuration option is outdated and has been removed in newer versions of n8n. This misconfiguration prevents proper handling of webhook requests, leading to connection issues during OAuth.
fix_steps: Update the `.env` file to replace `WEBHOOK_TUNNEL_URL` with `WEBHOOK_URL`
Restart the n8n Docker container to apply the changes
Retry the OAuth process for Google Drive
agent_instruction: Replace `WEBHOOK_TUNNEL_URL` with `WEBHOOK_URL` in your configuration and restart n8n.
